{{CargoClone
|name=Koryeon Commissioner
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=175
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} DEF +60
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Troop Earth DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Troop Earth DMG +1.5%
|}}
